creator: felipe@felipeoliva.eti.br
text:
(In reply to Emmanuel Vadot from comment #1)

SO version: FreeBSD 12.1-RELEASE-p4 r360493
Ports svn revision: 534083

And here trying the pkg version that crashes the smtpd:

Sample of smtpd.conf:
...
filter "rspamd" proc-exec "/usr/local/libexec/opensmtpd/opensmtpd-filter-rspamd"
...
listen on vtnet0 tls pki "mail.domain.com" hostname "mail.domain.com" filter "rspamd"
...
